name: Stündenglass Modül Tank
summary: A replacement quartz heating tank for the Stündenglass Modül vaporiser.
description: This is a replacement tank for the Stündenglass Modül, with a full quartz chamber and a stainless-steel heating element for even heating of dried material or concentrate. The magnetic connection ring clicks securely onto the Modül for quick swaps. It is a spare or replacement part rather than a standalone device, useful for keeping a Modül running or switching cleanly between materials. You will need the Modül vaporiser itself for this to do anything.
